---
title: Test Callouts
layout: single
---

## Note without title

::: {.callout-note}
This is a note without a title.
:::

## Tip with title

::: {.callout-tip}
## Tip With Title

This is a tip with a title.
:::

## Collapsed warning

::: {.callout-warning collapse="true"}
## Collapsed Warning

This is collapsed.
:::

## Caution

::: {.callout-caution}
Caution content.
:::

## Important with title

::: {.callout-important}
## Important!

Important content here.
:::

## Note with title= attribute

::: {.callout-note title="Custom Title via Attribute"}
This callout uses the `title=` attribute syntax.
:::
